name: LVL Beam 1.75" x 9.5" per linear foot (estimated)
notes: Source: Ontario / Canada national range. Homeguide (2026 data): 1.75"x7.25"–11.25" LVL = $3–$5/LF materials; Ontario contractor markup 50–100%. Estimated $7–$10/LF supply-only. Manual verification with Muskoka supplier recommended

name: R-50 Blown-In Attic Insulation installed
notes: Source: Ontario province range. Ontario installed rate 2026: fibreglass blown-in ~$1.90–$2.50/sqft installed; R-50 requires ~15–16" of fibreglass. Range $2.00–$3.00/sqft for Muskoka; add 15–20% rural premium. Source: Konstruction Group mid-2026 Ontario data

name: Spray Foam Closed-Cell (per board foot installed)
notes: Source: Ontario province range. Ontario 2026: $1.25–$2.50/bf closed-cell installed. Use $1.75–$2.25 for mid-range Muskoka contractor rate. Source: SprayFoam GL Ontario 2026 guide. Manual quote recommended

name: Engineered Hardwood Mid-Grade (supply only)
notes: Source: Ontario / Canada range. RenoCalc Feb 2026: $8–$16/sqft installed hardwood; material-only mid-grade estimated $6–$10/sqft CAD. Use $7–$9 supply; add $2–$4 install. Manual supplier quote recommended

name: Engineered Hardwood High-End (supply only)
notes: Source: Ontario / Canada range. HomeGuide 2026: high-end (7+ core layers) $9–$16/sqft supply. Use $11–$14 for Muskoka mid-high tier. Manual supplier quote recommended

name: Luxury Vinyl Plank (LVP) Mid-Grade (supply only)
notes: Source: Ontario / Canada range. Peace of Mind Interiors 2025: LVP CAD $2.79–$6.97/sqft; mid-grade ~$3.50–$5.00. Use $4.00 as mid-point

name: Porcelain Tile 12x24 Mid-Grade (supply only)
notes: Source: Ontario / Canada range. New Canadians Lumber online: $1.99/sqft entry-level; mid-grade 12x24 porcelain ~$3.95–$5.95/sqft. Use $4.95 as representative mid-grade. Tile Stone Source CA confirmed $3.95–$4.95 range

name: Ceramic Tile 12x12 Builder Grade (supply only)
notes: Source: Ontario / Canada range. Builder-grade ceramic 12x12 typically $1.99–$3.99/sqft in Ontario. Use $3.00 as a mid-point. Manual supplier verification recommended

name: Tile Thinset + Grout Materials (per sqft installed)
notes: Source: Ontario / Canada range. Material cost for thinset+grout: ~$1.00–$2.00/sqft combined. Use $1.50 as estimate. Verify with tile supplier

name: Heated Floor Mat 120V (supply only per sqft)
notes: Source: Ontario / Canada range. WarmlyYours 2026: electric mat systems $6–$12/sqft supply-only. Use $9–$12 for quality 120V mat. HD Canada QuietWarmth listing confirmed but price not shown. Manual quote recommended

name: Primer - Interior (per gallon)
notes: Source: Ontario / Canada range. BM Fresh Start or equivalent interior primer ~$50–$65/gal in Ontario. Manual verification at local dealer recommended

name: Stain - Interior/Exterior (per gallon)
notes: Source: Ontario / Canada range. BM Arborcoat or Cabot stain ~$60–$75/gal in Ontario. Manual verification at local dealer recommended

name: Polyurethane Oil-Based (per gallon)
notes: Source: Ontario / Canada range. General Finishes or Varathane oil-based poly ~$65–$80/gal in Ontario. Manual verification at local dealer recommended

name: Kitchen Faucet Mid-Tier (each)
notes: Source: Ontario / Canada range. Mid-range kitchen faucet Chrome/Nickel: $150–$400 retail Canada. Use $250 as mid-point. Manual verification at local supplier recommended

name: Bathroom Faucet Mid-Tier (each)
notes: Source: Ontario / Canada range. Mid-range bath faucet: $80–$300. Use $150 as representative mid-tier. Manual verification at local supplier recommended

name: Stock Kitchen Cabinet Mid-Tier (per linear foot)
notes: Source: Ontario / Canada range. Ottawa General Contractors 2025: stock cabinets $160–$380/LF. Canadian national: $100–$400/LF supply only. Use $250 as mid-tier Muskoka estimate. IKEA (~$200/LF) or Home Depot stock available for reference

name: Quartz Countertop Installed (per sqft)
notes: Source: Ontario province range. Natural Stone City Ontario 2026: entry-level installed $55–$75/sqft; mid-range $75–$100/sqft. Use $85 for Muskoka mid-range (slight rural premium). Manual quote from local fabricator strongly recommended

name: Granite Countertop Installed (per sqft)
notes: Source: Ontario / Canada range. Masters Countertops 2025: granite installed $45–$100/sqft. Ontario mid-tier ~$65–$85/sqft. Use $75. Manual quote from local fabricator strongly recommended

name: Tile Backsplash Installed (per sqft)
notes: Source: Ontario / Canada range. Dupont Plumbing Toronto 2025: tile installation $12–$20/sqft; ceramic $5–$10/sqft tile material. Combined installed backsplash ~$18–$28/sqft. Use $22 for Muskoka mid-tier

name: Vinyl Casement Window Mid-Size (each)
notes: Source: Ontario / Canada range. Ecoline Windows 2026: Ontario double-pane casement $650–$790 supply-only; triple-pane $730–$790. Mid-size with installation ~$800–$1,200. Use $750 supply-only for standard mid-size casement. Local Muskoka installer markup applies

name: Cedar Shingles Siding/Roofing (per square = 100 sqft)
notes: Source: Ontario / Canada range. JD Wood Revival Canada 2025: cedar roof $14–$18/sqft installed = $1,400–$1,800/square installed. Material-only cedar shingles ~$600–$900/square. Use $750 for material-only mid-grade. Muskoka premium likely 10–15% above GTA pricing

name: Asphalt Shingles 30-Year Architectural (per square = 100 sqft)
notes: Source: Ontario / Canada range. RenoAssistance 2026: asphalt $7/sqft installed = $700/square installed. Material-only architectural shingles ~$120–$250/square (US data). Canadian equivalent ~$150–$200/square for 30-yr architectural. Use $175. Manual supplier quote recommended

name: Composite Decking Board (per linear foot)
notes: Source: Ontario / Canada range. Absolute Home Services Canada: Fiberon/Fortress mid-tier $12–$16/sqft (boards). 5/4x6 composite board ~12 sqft/12 LF = ~$12–$16/LF. Use $15. Trex/TimberTech premium: ~$20–$28/LF. Manual supplier quote recommended

name: 5/4" Pressure-Treated Decking Board (per linear foot)
notes: Source: Ontario / Canada range. GV Decks Vaughan 2025: standard 5/4" PT boards $4–$6/LF. Ontario pricing consistent across multiple sources. Use $5.00. Add Muskoka delivery charge if ordering from distant yard

name: Demo Allowance per Room (lump sum estimate)
notes: Source: Ontario contractor range. Estimated 1-day labour + debris removal for standard 12x12 room demo. $800–$1,800 depending on scope. Muskoka carpenter rate $32–$48/hr x 8hr + disposal. Use $1,200 as mid-range. Site-specific

name: Disposal Fee (per ton)
notes: Source: Ontario / Muskoka waste management range. YORK1 Bracebridge/Muskoka: $5/day rental standard; overweight fees ~$120/tonne above included weight. Muskoka/Simcoe waste tip fees ~$80–$140/tonne. Use $120/tonne. Verify with Muskoka District Municipality waste facility

name: Drywaller (per sqft installed — hang tape finish)
notes: Source: Ontario / Canada range. CSG Renovation Canada: drywall labour $1.00–$2.70/sqft. Full hang+tape+finish: $1.50–$3.50/sqft total. Use $2.00/sqft labour. Muskoka contractors may quote per-sheet or day rate

name: Painter (per sqft two-coat)
notes: Source: Ontario / Canada range. Ontario painter two-coat: typically $1.50–$3.00/sqft labour. Use $2.00 for standard rooms. Trim/detailed work higher. Muskoka painters often price per room or day

name: Tile Setter (per sqft)
notes: Source: Ontario / Canada range. Dupont Plumbing Toronto 2025: tile installation $12–$20/sqft labour. Muskoka: $12–$18/sqft typical. Use $14/sqft

name: Flooring Installer – Hardwood (per sqft)
notes: Source: Ontario / Canada range. RenoCalc Canada 2026: hardwood installation labour $2–$4/sqft. Muskoka contractors ~$3–$5/sqft. Use $4.00

name: Flooring Installer – LVP (per sqft)
notes: Source: Ontario / Canada range. RenoCalc Canada 2026: LVP installation labour $1.50–$3.00/sqft. Use $2.50 for Muskoka mid-tier
